Apple's market share in this decade is unlikely to exceed 15% of the business PC market, with large MIS shops putting up the largest resistance to Apple's marketing efforts.
At 10%-20% of the surveyed sites, Apple was an established supplier with a healthy installed base.

However, the other 80% of the large enterprises we surveyed had such a low visibility on Apple that when asked how many Macintoshes were installed, replied they either didn't know, didn't care, or that "a couple were around somewhere."
